infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: SpeedVision uses the camera only when you start a traffic detection session.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Audio is optional while recording traffic video.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: SpeedVision needs access to traffic videos you choose for analysis.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow SpeedVision to access your camera
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow SpeedVision to access your microphone
